expected.summary: C-TN-3 RECEIVER / WIRE-LEGAL limb: even though v0.2 does not ORIGINATE PAUSED, raw PAUSED remains schema-RECEIVABLE — the bare string 'PAUSED' validates valid:true against #/$defs/C3_Status because PAUSED is a legal C3_Status wire value per C-DR-3 (the enum retains it for forward-compat + receiver/aggregation propagation per C-AV-8). instances[0] 'PAUSED' => valid:true is the load-bearing receivability assertion. The receivability is for the EXACT reserved literal only, not a loose match: case-drift 'paused' (idx 1) and 'Paused' (idx 2) are NOT receivable (valid:false), mirroring C-DR-2 case discipline. instances[3..4] BLOCKED/DROPPED_SILENTLY confirm the values the impl actually originates are themselves wire-legal — i.e. wire-legality does NOT imply originability (the two are distinct: wire-receivable superset { ...,PAUSED } vs v0.2-originable subset { ...,no PAUSED }). The originate (MUST NOT) limb is pinned in three_new_values_paused_reserved_not_originated.json.
